pyqgis_plugin.name: EstHub Satiladu viewer
pyqgis_plugin.description: Avab värsked ESTHub Satilao WMS kihid koos navigeerimisvõimalusega. Võimaldab QGIS kaardivaate alusel tehtud päringu põhjal sirvida pilvituid kaardilehti.

pyqgis_plugin.name: Mavic 3E Projector
pyqgis_plugin.description: Projects vector layers onto raw DJI 3E/4T photos and draws the camera FOV on the 2D map. Add pins directly onto photos and display them on 2d map.
pyqgis_plugin.about: Reads DJI XMP EXIF data and uses OpenCV to map 3D vector features onto the 2D image plane, and reverse ray-casts the camera footprint.

pyqgis_plugin.name: QGIS Target
pyqgis_plugin.description: In-place Erase and Erase Outside clipping tool (with Set Target feature)
pyqgis_plugin.about: Lets user set features as targets and clip them with selected objects (erase/erase outside). Compatible with QGIS 3.x and 4.x. Added disaggregate function as of v1.04 and Fit Target v1.05 (preview).

pyqgis_plugin.name: QGIS TAB Exporter
pyqgis_plugin.about: Prevents coordinate shifting by enforcing strict bounds and Decimal snapping.

pyqgis_plugin.name: QGIS Natura topology check
pyqgis_plugin.description: Compares user registry inputs against EELIS:natura_elupaik WFS layer and runs MapInfo/EELIS style topology checks.
pyqgis_plugin.about: Compares user registry inputs against EELIS:natura_elupaik WFS layer and runs MapInfo/EELIS style topology checks.

pyqgis_plugin.name: QGIS Pivot Dashboard
pyqgis_plugin.description: Drag and drop pivot table dashboard for spatial and attribute statistics. Spatial join, geosearch, WFS catalog.
pyqgis_plugin.about: A flexible BI-style pivot dashboard for QGIS layers.
